mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( name, email, password, phone ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{phone} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_date IS NULL
UPDATE users SET phone = #{phone}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_date IS NULL
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_date IS NULL
